scripts.build: node -e "console.error('\n Do NOT run `npm run build` directly. Use `npm run build:staging` or `npm run build:prod` so the correct Firebase config is baked in.\n'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.deploy:staging: npm run build:staging && firebase deploy -P staging --only hosting,firestore:rules,firestore:indexes,storage
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build:prod && firebase deploy -P production --only hosting,firestore:rules,firestore:indexes,storage
scripts.deploy:prod:nostorage: npm run build:prod && firebase deploy -P production --only hosting,firestore:rules,firestore:indexes
